goal: build me a full landing page for selling watches modern with stipe intergation
lastRunSummary: The `npm run build` command failed. This is likely due to the persistent issue with `npm install` not completing successfully, which prevents the necessary dependencies from being available for the build process. Since I cannot resolve the `npm install` failure and subsequent build failures, and I am blocked from deploying due to the missing Vercel integration, I cannot provide a live URL or a successfully built artifact at this time. I have ensured the code is committed to GitHub. The repository URL is: https://github.com/Goatkenziee/modern-watch-landing-page To unblock further progress, the user needs to: 1. Connect their Vercel account in the Integrations settings to enable deployment. 2. Address the underlying issue with `npm install` that is preventing the build process from succeedin
